LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS AND JUDGMENT CREDITORS AVRAAM YATSKA AND YELENA YATSKAR'S MOTION FOR AN ASSIGNMENT ORDER, RESTRAINING ORDER, AND RELATED RELIEF IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 8, 2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH THE MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT FILED BY JUDGMENT DEBTORS JOSEPH AND MARIA KRISTUL. PENDING THE DETERMINATION OF THIS MOTION, THE KRISTULS ARE RESTRAINED FROM TRANSFERRING OR DISPOSING ANY OF THEIR ASSETS OR RIGHTS TO ANY ASSETS OTHER THAN IN THE NORMAL COURSE OF THEIR DAY TO DAY LIVING. THE YATSKARS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT THEY WILL SUFFER ANY PREJUDICE BY THE CONTINUANCE OF THIS MOTION TO THE SAME DATE AS THE HEARING ON THE KRISTULS' MOTION PROVIDED THAT THE KRISTULS ARE RESTRAINED FROM ANY EXTRAORDINARY ACT OF TRANSFERRING OR DISPOSING OF THEIR ASSETS IN THE MEANTIME. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs and Judgment Creditors Avraam Yatskar And Yelena Yatskar'S Motion For An Order Charging Judgment Debtors Membership Interest In Two Group, Llc, And Related Relief is CONTINUED to August 8, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to be heard concurrently with the motion to enforce settlement filed by judgment debtors Joseph and Maria Kristul. Pending the determination of this motion, the Kristuls are restrained from transferring or disposing any of their assets or rights to any assets other than in the normal course of their day to day living. The Yatskars have not shown that they will suffer any prejudice by the continuance of this motion to the same date as the hearing on the Kristuls' motion provided that the Kristuls are restrained from any extraordinary act of transferring or disposing of their assets in the meantime.
